description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular lotion bottle with a clean, minimalist design. The exterior is smooth and predominantly white or light gray, with subtle horizontal banding that may indicate fill levels or design accents. One side of the bottle features a printed label with text and symbols, likely containing product information, instructions, and branding. The cap is flat and seamlessly integrated with the body, suggesting a modern, streamlined appearance. There are no visible pump, flip-top, or other dispenser mechanisms, indicating the cap may be removed to access the contents. The overall look is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A tall, rectangular, smooth white lotion bottle with a minimalist label and a flat cap.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the side, showing a plain, smooth surface with no visible label or features.
description_view_1: Another plain side view, similar to view 0, with a smooth, unmarked surface.
description_view_2: This view displays the back of the bottle, featuring a detailed printed label with text and symbols.
description_view_3: A third plain side view, again showing a smooth, unmarked surface.
